wiki.summary: "the cure" is a song by American singer-songwriter Olivia Rodrigo from her third studio album, "you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love." Rodrigo wrote it with the song’s producer, Dan Nigro. The song was released as the second single from the album on May 22, 2026, by Geffen Records. She stated that it is her "favorite song on the album and one of my favorite songs I've ever made". Rodrigo called the song the "thesis statement" of the album, saying that it "made the whole album click" for her. Read more on Last.fm.
